workflow.name: KDBP Development Story
workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by: {project-root}/_kdbp/core/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed: {installed_path}/workflow.yaml
Communicate all responses in {communication_language} tailored to {user_skill_level}
ECC-ORCHESTRATED STORY DEVELOPMENT — Sequence: planner -> tdd-guide -> build-error-resolver -> code-reviewer
Create handoff documents between sequential agent phases. Synthesize outputs after each agent completes.
AUTO-PROCEED MODE: Skip generic "Continue?" confirmations. Only pause at decision points inside step files.
DBP BOOKEND PATTERN: Step 0 loads behaviors (or sets dbp_active=false). Step 10 runs story checkpoint. All DBP checks between are gated on {{dbp_active}}.

step.goal: Load behavior values into hot tier
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-00-behavior-load.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-01-knowledge.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-02-story-discovery.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-03-branch-guard.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-04-planning.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-05a-tdd-setup.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-05b-tdd-loop.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-06-validation.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-07-test-health.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-08-review.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-09-completion.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-10-story-checkpoint.md
